channel.title: imisofts Blog
channel.description: Expert insights on AI automation, web development, digital marketing, and business growth strategies

item.title: 7 Best Cold Email Software in 2026 (Tested & Ranked)
item.description: We tested 7 cold email platforms sending 10M+ emails. See real inbox rates, pricing, and features. Instantly, Smartlead, Lemlist, and 4 more ranked.
item.author: growth@imisofts.com (Zeeshan Waheed)

item.title: Instantly vs Lemlist 2026: Which Gets More Replies? (Tested)
item.description: Data from 3M+ emails: Instantly gets 94% inbox rate vs Lemlist's 86%. Full 2026 pricing, features, deliverability data, and ROI comparison inside.
item.author: growth@imisofts.com (Zeeshan Waheed)

item.title: How to Warm Up Email Domains for Cold Email (2026 Protocol)
item.description: 14-day domain warm-up protocol used on 500+ cold email campaigns. Step-by-step ramp plan, DNS setup, and tools to hit 95%+ inbox placement from day one.
item.author: growth@imisofts.com (Zeeshan Waheed)

item.title: Cold Email Deliverability: Hit 95% Inbox Rate in 2026
item.description: Data-backed deliverability guide from managing 2M+ cold emails monthly. DNS setup, warm-up protocols, rotation tactics, and monitoring tools for 95%+ inbox rate.
item.author: growth@imisofts.com (Zeeshan Waheed)

item.title: How Many Domains for Cold Email? 2026 Calculator & Guide
item.description: Calculate exactly how many domains and inboxes you need for cold email in 2026. Volume-based formula, cost breakdown, and infrastructure scaling strategies.
item.author: growth@imisofts.com (Zeeshan Waheed)

item.title: n8n AI Workflow Generator: Create JSON in Seconds (Free Tool)
item.description: Stop spending hours building n8n workflows manually. Our AI-powered generator creates importable JSON workflows from simple text descriptions. Used by 500+ businesses to automate their operations.
item.author: growth@imisofts.com (Zeeshan Waheed)

item.title: Instantly vs Smartlead: Best Cold Email Platform in 2025
item.description: Compare Instantly.ai vs Smartlead.ai for cold email automation in 2025. Features, pricing, deliverability, and which platform wins for your business needs.
item.author: growth@imisofts.com (Zeeshan Waheed)

item.title: Instantly.ai Lead Generation: Scale Your Outreach in 2025
item.description: Discover how Instantly.ai transforms cold email lead generation with unlimited sending accounts, AI-powered warmup, and smart automation. Complete setup guide inside.
item.author: growth@imisofts.com (Zeeshan Waheed)

item.title: AI Agents Are Revolutionizing SMB Operations
item.description: How AI automation is transforming small business growth in 2025. Discover strategies that 91% of SMBs are using to boost revenue and reduce operational costs by up to 60%.
item.author: growth@imisofts.com (Zeeshan Waheed)

item.title: How AI Automation Saves Businesses 60% on Operations
item.description: Discover how AI automation can dramatically reduce operational costs while improving efficiency and accuracy.
item.author: growth@imisofts.com (Zeeshan Waheed)

item.title: The Complete Guide to Cold Email Infrastructure
item.description: Learn how to set up professional cold email infrastructure that delivers 95%+ inbox rates.

item.title: Modern Web Development: Next.js vs React
item.description: A comprehensive comparison of Next.js and React for modern web application development.
